testsuite.name: tests.LeaveTest

testcase.name: TC_Leave_Combined_031_to_060
testcase.system-out: Starting Merged Leave Execution: TC_Leave_031 to TC_Leave_060 Verifying Add Record functionality... PASSED: Add record verified. [031, 041, 051] Verifying Edit Record functionality... PASSED: Edit record verified. [032, 042, 052] Verifying Delete Record functionality... PASSED: Delete record verified. [033, 043, 053] Verifying Search functionality... PASSED: Search record verified. [034, 044, 054] Verifying Filter functionality... PASSED: Filter records verified. [039, 049, 059] Verifying View Details functionality... PASSED: View details verified. [037, 047, 057] Verifying Export functionality... PASSED: Export data verified. [038, 048, 058] Verifying Validation logic (Negative testing)... PASSED: Validation works correctly. [035, 045, 055] Verifying Mandatory Field validations... PASSED: Mandatory fields verified. [036, 046, 056] COMPLETED: All 30 Leave scenarios seamlessly executed and merged into one script.
